title: AI Authoring Response v1
description: Structured response containing a single AI-generated artifact.

targetRepo.description: Repository that should receive this payload.

targetPath.description: Repository-relative path where this payload should be written.

schemaRef.description: Canonical schema URI that this payload conforms to.

payload.description: Schema-conformant JSON object to write to disk.

prismMeta.description: Optional inline prism metadata describing the generator and constraints.
